ddls:
CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state or project */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state or project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the state or project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the state was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state or project the node belongs to */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the node */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status of the node (e.g., active, maintenance) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the node */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the node where the resource is located */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., vehicle, personnel, equipment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the resource (if applicable) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the resource (if applicable) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of manufacture of the resource (if applicable) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being allocated */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node where the resource is allocated */,
  "time_to_resource_seconds" REAL /* Time in seconds for the resource to reach the node */,
  "resource_duration_seconds" REAL /* Duration in seconds for which the resource is used at the node */,
  "resource_length_meters" REAL /* Length in meters covered by the resource during the allocation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the resource allocation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the resource allocation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource allocation (e.g., pending, in_progress, completed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource allocation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource allocation was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., manager, supervisor, operator) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role association was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the request */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being requested */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node where the resource is required */,
  "request_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the resource request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource request was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the resource request was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_requests_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_requests_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_status_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status history entry */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource (e.g., available, allocated, maintenance) */,
  "status_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status was recorded */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status history entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the status history entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_status_history_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)
